name: Ear Doctor Care Game
description: Ear doctor game is a simulation game to treat ear in the emergency doctor room. Ear Doctor Game to treat all sorts of wounds and have tons of fun playing hospital games! Use modern medical tools as a professional surgeon in a doctor game. Doctor games are the best way to start practicing if you’re dreaming of becoming a surgeon and save lives when you grow up! Use foot surgery medical tools as a professional doctor in a hospital game.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
